title: Polish Garlic Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring tender polish meat, sautéed with garlic and served in a bowl.
instructions: 1. Slice the polish sausage into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat.
3. Add the sliced polish sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Remove the cooked sausage from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
6. Add the minced garlic and garlic powder to the skillet and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
7. Add the cooked polish sausage back into the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic mixture.
8. Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve the polish garlic mixture in a bowl.
10. Garnish with additional garlic powder if desired.
